command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/test_wave1_reliability.py
python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('/tmp/test_wave1_reliability.py').read()); print('SYNTAX OK')"
cp /tmp/test_wave1_reliability.py tests/test_wave1_reliability.py
echo 'Test file deployed.'
wc -l tests/test_wave1_reliability.py
ENDSSH
